research.query: Hewalex 波兰 HVAC pump distributor manufacturer
research.summary: About us – Kolektory słoneczne, pompy ciepła, fotowoltaika Hewalex https://www. hewalex. pl/en/about-us/ Hewalex is a family-run company, established 35 years ago, long before the renewable energies` market started to develop in Poland.

outreach_notes: 该公司为Tier1重要目标。建议联系出口/采购负责人，强调 Farreach 的 OEM 产能优势（越南工厂月产 80 万件）和价格竞争力。
